overview.summary: Model score 9 vs user score 5 (gap 4). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech, Motion / Restlessness. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Policy anchored on historical averages, which may not reflect session-specific context and subjective readiness.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Frequent posture changes should reduce focus confidence unless corroborated by improved audio and vitals.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Apply stronger session-specific context weighting over historical baseline anchoring.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
